name: Pizza (Floyd on Italy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour onto a work surface and make a well in the middle.
2. Pour the dissolved yeast into the well, then add the salt and mix.
3. Gradually add the warm water while kneading continuously to form a soft, pliable dough.
4. Knead the dough until it is light and elastic.
5. Form the dough into four balls.
6. Place the balls on floured plates and cover them. Let them rise in a warm place for about 1 hour.
7. Roll out the dough balls into circles that are approximately 12 inches in diameter.
8. Drizzle a little olive oil over the surface of each circle.
9. Top with ingredients of your choice.
10. Bake for 12-15 minutes at the oven's highest temperature on a preheated flat metal baking tray, ensuring the base cooks crisply.
Source: Keith Floyd, Floyd on Italy, Sunday Magazine, News of The World.
